summary: Complete testing of Whitelist Cashback Dashboard feature. 20/20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified: Add user, Edit user, Delete user with confirmation, Add monthly spend with auto-cashback calculation, Edit/Delete spend, Search filter, Referral dropdown filter, PDF download for user and referral, Stats cards updating correctly, Referral summary table.

issues: Console warning: Recharts width/height -1 when chart container is not visible during initial render (cosmetic, non-blocking, pre-existing issue)

seed_data_creation: Test user 'UI Test User' created and deleted during UI testing. Backend tests created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed users.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Whitelist Cashback feature fully tested. Backend routes: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/whitelist, GET/POST /api/admin/whitelist/{id}/spends, PUT/DELETE /api/admin/whitelist/spends/{id}, POST proof upload, GET PDF for user and referral, GET summary. Frontend page at /admin/whitelist with AdminNav link 'Whitelist CB'. All CRUD operations working correctly with proper validation (duplicate month/year rejection, 404 for non-existent resources). Cashback auto-calculation verified (18% of 5,000,000 = 900,000).

backend_api_tests: ✓ GET /api/admin/whitelist/summary - Get aggregated summary with referrals
✓ POST /api/admin/whitelist/{id}/spends - Create monthly spend with auto-cashback
✓ PUT /api/admin/whitelist/spends/{id} - Update spend with recalculated cashback
✓ POST proof to nonexistent spend returns 404
✓ GET referral PDF for nonexistent returns 404
✓ DELETE /api/admin/whitelist/{id} - Delete user and cascade spends
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ Stats cards showing Total User, Total Ad Spend, Total Cashback
✓ Add new whitelist user via modal form (all fields working)
✓ Delete whitelist user with confirmation dialog
✓ Expand user card to see spending details
✓ Add monthly spend for a user (with auto cashback calculation - 18% of 5M = 900K)
✓ Referral summary table showing grouped data
✓ Generate PDF for individual user (download verified: cashback_UI_Test_User_Updated_20260311.pdf)
✓ Generate PDF per referral group (download verified: cashback_referral_TestReferral_20260311.pdf)
✓ Toast notifications for all CRUD operations
✓ Empty state display when no users

features_verified.user_crud: Full CRUD with name, email, phone, cashback_percentage, referral, notes fields
features_verified.monthly_spend_tracking: Add/Edit/Delete spend with auto-cashback calculation based on user's percentage
features_verified.duplicate_prevention: Backend rejects duplicate month/year spend entries
features_verified.proof_upload: File upload endpoint working, proof_url stored and accessible
features_verified.pdf_generation: PDF reports generated for individual users and referral groups with spending breakdown
features_verified.referral_summary: Aggregated table showing users per referral with totals
